cards.name: Werewolf
cards.abilityDescription: Takes 20% less damage. Each attack: lose 5% MAX HP and deal +25% of total HP missing as bonus damage

cards.name: Shadow Stalker
cards.abilityDescription: Permanently poisons enemy — 3% of their MAX HP per turn until they die

cards.name: Ice Golem
cards.abilityDescription: While alive, all allies are immune to stuns. On death, two allies lose 10% damage but gain a one-hit block.

cards.name: Ice Wyvern
cards.abilityDescription: On death: revive once with 40% MAX HP and freeze the active enemy for 1 turn

cards.name: Ice Dragon
cards.abilityDescription: Battle start passive: while alive, whenever an enemy is stunned, the current active ally immediately strikes that enemy for 75% of this card's ATK as bonus damage. On entry: stuns the current enemy

cards.name: Ember Mage
cards.abilityDescription: On death: applies Burn (7% MAX HP when they attack, 3 turns) to ALL enemies including those not yet in battle

cards.name: Fire Spirit
cards.abilityDescription: On death, permanently burn all enemies and deal 20% of max HP to all enemies.

cards.name: Phoenix
cards.abilityDescription: Revives once at 60% HP with +50% ATK permanently upon death

cards.name: Slime
cards.abilityDescription: While active in battle: disables the active enemy's ability

cards.name: Slime Warrior
cards.abilityDescription: Whenever this card takes damage, gains 50% of the damage taken as bonus ATK (permanent for the battle)

cards.name: The Overseer
cards.abilityDescription: Whenever an ally takes damage: gains 15% of damage as ATK and 5% as HP (permanent for the battle)

cards.name: Peace Keeper
cards.abilityDescription: 20% chance to dodge. On dodge: counter for 25% of incoming damage. On fatal hit: survive at 1 HP (once per battle)

cards.name: Heavenly Warrior
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: gain 10% lifesteal and become immune to debuffs. Attacks pierce for 10% ATK to all enemies

cards.name: God Of Thunder
cards.abilityDescription: Every 3rd attack: strikes all enemies with 50% ATK, applies 15% damage amp for 2 turns, and stuns current enemy for 1 turn

cards.name: Odin
cards.abilityDescription: Battle start: summon Heavenly Scout with 25% of Odin's HP+ATK (+10% per Valhalla card on team). Damage taken by Odin is redirected to the Scout
